text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We welcome the new year and the start of
Manhattan Cafe's classic year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Normally, this would be a time to set ambitious
resolutions, but...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
With this body... I'm in no position to be talking
about wild ambitions yet...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
This year, at the very least, I want to be able to
touch the tips of her hair...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With Manhattan Cafe struggling to toughen up
her weak constitution, her goals remain out of
reach. But, if nothing else, I can still lift her
mood...
choice_data_list:
How about we take a walk for a change of
pace?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
That... might be nice. I shouldn't stay cooped up
indoors...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Well, if it isn't Cafe and her trainer.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Tachyon.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
How was last year for you? With the few races I
entered, I couldn't test a whole lot. Nothing
impressive, overall.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
You... don't seem in a rush to prove anything,
though.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
If things really weren't going well... you wouldn't
be making that face.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Very astute. After so many hours spent in the lab
together, you've caught on to my thinking
patterns.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You're right, I'm in no rush. Everything is in line
with my expectations.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
This was always how Plan A was supposed to pan
out.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though Agnes Tachyon sounds upbeat, I can't see
any joy in her eyes.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Realistically, however, if I keep running at this
pace, I'm looking at another ten years before I
reach the full potential of an Umamusume. As
such...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I've decided to enter the Yayoi Sho, the trial race
for the Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: The Yayoi Sho...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Well, I'm sure you have your own path planned
out. I just thought I'd let you know.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Who knows, maybe you'll want to enter now that
you've heard I'll be running too.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Quite... the opposite. I no longer wish to enter.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
If we both entered, you'd be giving me all kinds
of chores on the day of the race.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha, you're quite perceptive! It's only with
your help that I can maintain my current lifestyle.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Alone, I end up lying unconscious in the middle of
the road. You really saved me that time, by the
way.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: That's... not normal...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Besides, you can't influence me. The only one who
gets to decide my path... is my friend.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I won't let you sway— Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Rumble... Rumble...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
No, it's nothing. Just an illusion... right? It must
have been...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Rumble... Rumble...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Ugh.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Well, good day. Until we meet again.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Cheers to the year ahead. Whatever your path
may be.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon walks away, leaving Cafe
disgruntled.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Could we... do something else? I think I'd like to...
clear my head.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I want to forget about what Tachyon said, so...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I collect myself and decide to go along with her
request. But what should we do?
choice_data_list: Let's go see how the fish are doing.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...Go see the fish? I'm not sure what you mean,
but...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
If I can rinse all these thoughts away... I'd be
happy to.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I take Manhattan Cafe to the aquarium, and we
find ourselves utterly captivated by the tanks...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...Fish swim on endlessly, quietly enduring the
pressure from the water all around them...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I have to be as strong as they are...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After relating to the fish on an emotional level,
Manhattan Cafe starts to understand what it
means to be resilient.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Coffee... Yes, its rich aroma always helps me take
my mind off things.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
All right... Why don't we go to that cafe? I usually
go by myself, but...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Do you... know the "etiquette" here? This cafe has
a certain... way of doing things...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
First, enjoy the scent drifting toward you... Then,
savor a seasonal sip...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe enjoys her beverage, one careful
sip at a time.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I'm not very fond of crowded areas. I feel as if I'm
going to get swallowed up and disappear.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: But... if you're with me...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I might actually enjoy myself... browsing clothes
and furniture I've never seen before...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and the vintage siphons... I could find myself
some antique cups, too...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe isn't the type to go on strolls
around town, but it looks like discovering some
new items has lifted her spirits.
